On every 3rd round, deal the accumulated damage as True damage to all enemy familiars (this damage is uncapped), heal for 20% of the damage dealt, and reset the accumulated damage. Only 1 'Brutality' effect can be active per team.

talent.name: Smokescreen
talent.description: Inflict the debuff Smokescreen to enemy familiars, causing a 45% chance to miss their attacks and damage from spells. This effect can last up to 3 turns.

talent.name: Omniscient Hack [PSV]
talent.description: Hack into your enemies in the beginning of the battle, gaining insight into your opponents. Decrease all damage taken by 18% and increase damage dealt by 15%.

talent.name: Freeze
talent.description: Inflict a stack of Frozen to enemy familiars, crippling their movement speed as well as permanently decreasing their ATK by 10%. Additionally, if the target is already Frozen, deal 4% of their max HP x number of rounds passed since they were Frozen as True damage.

talent.name: Poison
talent.description: Inflict a stack of Poison to enemy familiars, dealing 5 + 5% true damage every turn it persists.

talent.name: Celestial Blessing
talent.description: Increase your max Mana (up to 600 total) and Mana Regeneration by 18%, and heal allied familiars equal to 2x your max Mana.

talent.name: Temporal Rewind [PSV]
talent.description: Start off the battle buffing your allies with a stack of Temporal Rewind (this does not stack, and refreshes the ability instead). After 3 turns, restore your HP to half the difference between your original HP and your current HP, and deal the same amount as True damage to your opponent. Permanently increase your SPD/ATK/DEF by 20% after the rewind.

talent.name: Celestial Influence [PSV]
talent.description: Start off the battle with 40% increased Mana Regen, while decreasing enemy familiars' Mana Regen by 14%.

talent.name: Breaker
talent.description: Decrease the DEF of all enemy familiars by 20%.

talent.name: Miracle Injection [PSV]
talent.description: Start off the battle by decreasing your HP and max HP by 10%. Increase your SPD/ATK/DEF by the amount decreased x2.

talent.name: Unlucky Coin
talent.description: Roll a 20 sided dice. Enemy familiars have their HP/ATK/DEF/SPD reduced by the amount rolled x 2 at random.

talent.name: Yin Yang [PSV]
talent.description: At the beginning of the battle, at the start of your turn, gain a Yang buff, temporarily increasing your DEF by 75% and healing all allies by 4% of their max HP. This effect swaps to a Yin buff every other turn, temporarily increasing your ATK by 75% and permanently increasing your ATK and SPD by 5%. If a Yang buff is already in effect, a Yin buff will be applied instead, and vice versa.

talent.name: Soul Stealer [PSV]
talent.description: Absorb 4% of the enemy familiars' DEF every turn.

talent.name: Elemental Manipulation [PSV]
talent.description: At the beginning of the battle, at the start of your turn, change the element of all familiars to Dark and equip a Elemental Manipulation buff to your team. While the buff is active, this ability temporarily decreases DMG taken and increases DMG dealt by 3% and heals yourself for 2% of the lower of the enemies' current/max HP per turn. This buff expires when the enemy team is below 30% of their max HP.

talent.name: Ultimate Combo
talent.description: Every time this ability is casted, increase your Fighting Counter by 1, and gain 20 mana. This skill deals 3% of your SPD x the amount of Fighting Counters you have as True damage (unaffected by modifiers). If your allied familiars have a total of 3 Fighting Counters, this skill deals 30% of your opponent's max HP as True damage instead (unaffected by modifiers), and your Fighting Counters are reset back to 0.

talent.name: Trick Room
talent.description: If the enemy familiars' ATK is higher than yours, your allies gain ATK equal to 60% of the difference between the two ATK's, and simultaneously reduce their ATK by the same amount.

talent.name: Regeneration
talent.description: Every time this ability is cast, heal 7.5% of your HP, and add 1 stack of Regeneration, healing them for 7.5% HP per stack every turn.

talent.name: Rising Resolve [PSV]
talent.description: While your total stats (HP, ATK, DEF, SPD) are below your opponents' total stats, increase all your stats by 8% (max HP is increased instead of HP). The first time your total stats exceed your opponents' total stats, restore 10% of your max HP.

talent.name: Foul Play [PSV]
talent.description: Whenever enemy familiars increase their *basic* stats or heal, increase your stats by 22% of the amount as well. Only 1 'Foul Play' effect can be active per team.

talent.description: Inflict a stack of Frozen to enemy familiars, crippling their movement speed as well as permanently decreasing their ATK by 10%. Additionally, if the target is already Frozen, deal 4% of their max HP x number of rounds passed since they were Frozen as True damage.

talent.name: Berserker [PSV]
talent.description: While your health is *low*, increase the ATK of all allied familiars by 30%.

talent.description: While your health is *low*, increase the DEF of all allied familiars by 30%.

talent.name: Lethal Clarity [PSV]
talent.description: Increase your CRIT and ATK by 12%. Whenever you inflict a CRIT, heal for 45% of the damage dealt.
